summary: Iteration 48 - Tested 5 ICI/SSRTE form bug fixes. All 19 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend loads correctly. Bug 2 (taille_menage), Bug 3 (cross-form sync), Bug 4 (completion counter 5/5), Bug 5 (auto-update on completion) all verified working via API tests.
critical_code_review_comments: Bug 1 FIX VERIFIED: Mobile FarmerICIFormScreen.js uses TouchableOpacity buttons for genre selection (lines 311-322) instead of Picker - fixes mobile gender picker issue
Bug 2 FIX VERIFIED: ICIProfileModal.jsx line 135 and FarmerICIFormScreen.js line 190 both clean taille_menage with parseInt() || 1 before sending to API
Bug 3 FIX VERIFIED: ici_data_collection.py record_ssrte_visit() syncs taille_menage to ici_profiles (line 345). GET ici-profile pre-fills from SSRTE when no profile exists (lines 417-427)

Bug 4 FIX VERIFIED: field_agent_dashboard.py get_my_assigned_farmers() uses all_possible_ids (member_id + user_id) for form lookups (lines 399-400, 447-451). Koffi and KINDA YABRE correctly show 5/5 completion
Bug 5 FIX VERIFIED: check_and_update_farmer_completion() helper (lines 166-199) auto-logs agent_activities and updates coop_member when farmer reaches 5/5
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 ICI/SSRTE form bugs are fixed and verified. Agent Kone Alphone has 3 assigned farmers: Koffi (5/5), Balde ibo (3/5), KINDA YABRE (5/5). The cooperative account traore_eric@yahoo.fr has 0 members so ICI Profile modal cannot be tested end-to-end with that account. Use admin account or field agent account for testing with actual farmers.

bug_1_gender_picker_mobile.verification: Mobile FarmerICIFormScreen.js uses TouchableOpacity buttons instead of Picker for genre selection

bug_2_taille_menage_stuck_at_1.verification: API accepts taille_menage >= 1, rejects 0 with 422 validation error. Frontend cleans value with parseInt() || 1

bug_3_cross_form_autofill.verification: SSRTE visit syncs taille_menage to ICI profile. GET ICI profile pre-fills from latest SSRTE when no profile exists

bug_4_completion_counter_1_5.verification: GET /api/field-agent/my-farmers returns correct 5/5 for Koffi and KINDA YABRE. Uses all_possible_ids for form lookups

bug_5_auto_update_on_5_5.verification: check_and_update_farmer_completion() helper auto-logs to agent_activities and updates coop_member.all_forms_complete when 5/5 reached

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/field-agent/my-farmers: PASS - Returns 3 farmers with correct completion counts
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/ici-data/ssrte/visit: PASS - Creates visit and syncs taille_menage to ICI profile

frontend_tests.cooperative_dashboard_displays: PASS - Shows stats, actions, members section
